calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Oct-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Jul-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Linda Carden is suspended as Administrator. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner.

Ms. Stoneman stated that one of the Beneficiaries is on governmental benefits, that she was hesitant to close the estate until the Beneficiary can see a special needs Attorney, and that the Beneficiary has retained the Urbatsch Law Firm. The Court instructed Ms. Stoneman to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration within two weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to July 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To Jun-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner

Ms. Stoneman stated that there was no appearance on April 16, 2018 due to drama with the client, the client has hired an attorney to represent in the Special Needs Trust which is estimated at 6 weeks for setting up, and can soon close the estate. Ms. Stoneman further stated that she does not have an address for her client, can reach her client by phone, and will file a declaration with the above information. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Status on Filing of Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to May 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of said declaration.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
